metadata.description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace by glebmish.

plugins.name: git-history-rewrite
plugins.description: Safety net for destructive git operations: scopes `git filter-repo` to one ref, enforces `git push --force-with-lease --force-if-includes`, and orphan-checks `git reset --hard` to non-HEAD targets. Bundled PreToolUse hook blocks invocations missing required correct-form flags; the skill body covers the discipline items the hook can't enforce mechanically.
